caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and a tall, silver, stylized wig, speaks into a microphone in a studio setting. He wears large black over-ear headphones. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing displays, including a shirt with "LEE" printed on it. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is visible on the screen. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly while his head moves subtly. The background and equipment remain static, maintaining a consistent environment throughout the clip.
